introSection: Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fun Spot America Atlanta in Fayetteville, Georgia, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride first opened in 1999 as Python Pit at Jeepers! in Buffalo, New York. It then then closed that same year and reopened in 1999 as Python Pit at Jeepers! in Concord, North Carolina. It then closed in 2006 and reopened in 2007 as Python Pit Roller Coaster at Heritage Amusement Park in Golden, Colorado. It then closed on June 30, 2018 and reopened in 2019 as Kiddie Coaster at Fun Spot America Atlanta in Fayetteville, Georgia.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: While at Jeepers!, the coaster was painted black. Currently, the coaster is painted green with yellow track ties.

fullText:
Kiddie Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Fun Spot America Atlanta in Fayetteville, Georgia, USA.

The ride first opened in 1999 as Python Pit at Jeepers! in Buffalo, New York. It then then closed that same year and reopened in 1999 as Python Pit at Jeepers! in Concord, North Carolina. It then closed in 2006 and reopened in 2007 as Python Pit Roller Coaster at Heritage Amusement Park in Golden, Colorado. It then closed on June 30, 2018 and reopened in 2019 as Kiddie Coaster at Fun Spot America Atlanta in Fayetteville, Georgia.



While at Jeepers!, the coaster was painted black. Currently, the coaster is painted green with yellow track ties.
